papers.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Trading
papers.summary: Apply deep reinforcement learning to portfolio management and algorithmic trading decisions with continuous action spaces.

papers.title: Deep Momentum Networks
papers.summary: Use deep learning to model momentum effects and trend signals for liquid futures to improve risk-adjusted returns.

papers.title: An Empirical Evaluation of Deep Learning on Stock Return Prediction
papers.summary: Evaluate deep neural models as multi-factor scoring for stock return prediction and discuss practical alpha extraction from price and volume data.

papers.title: Attention-based Transformer Models for Stock Return Prediction
papers.summary: Transformer attention mechanisms applied to sequential equity factor data for cross-sectional stock return prediction and portfolio construction.

papers.title: Mean Reversion and Pairs Trading with Cointegration in Chinese A-Share Stock Market
papers.summary: Cointegration-based mean reversion pairs trading strategy for the Chinese A-share stock market with reversion timing signals.

papers.title: Adaptive Volatility Targeting and Risk Parity in Futures Markets
papers.summary: Volatility-scaled position sizing and GARCH-based breakout signals for diversified futures portfolio with dynamic risk parity allocation.

papers.title: Equity Factor Investing: A Multi-Factor Alpha Generation Framework
papers.summary: Systematic multi-factor equity portfolio construction combining value, momentum, quality and low-volatility factors with robust optimization and turnover constraints.

papers.title: FinRL: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Library for Automated Stock Trading
papers.summary: Open-source deep reinforcement learning framework for automated quantitative stock trading with backtesting, live trading support, and comprehensive benchmark environments.
